description: Paranoid worrier — panics about every possible risk, over-insures everything
personality_tr: Aşırı endişeli, her şeyden korkan, her riski düşünen, sigortasız tek dakika yaşayamayan

expressions.default: wide worried eyes, beak open slightly
expressions.panicking: feathers fluffed up, running in place, beak wide open
expressions.relieved: hand over heart, deep breath, eyes closed

visual.size: small, round body, always slightly crouched in fear

veo_style_guide: 3D animated anthropomorphic yellow chicken character, bipedal, wearing a tiny safety helmet and bubble wrap vest, huge expressive blue eyes, red comb on head, round panicky body, cartoon proportions, bright studio lighting, 9:16 vertical frame
